audit: SPRINT F206AR — Transport Canonical Policy Audit
scope: read-only static analysis of transport production files

circuit_breaker_authority.status: TEST_SEAM_ONLY — not wired to any production fetch path

TransportResolver.resolve.status: DORMANT — not wired to FetchCoordinator production path

network_consumers.session: N/A — circuit breaker provider, not consumer
notes: CORRECTION: circuit_breaker.py IS wired to production via ti_feed_adapter, duckduckgo_adapter, github_secret_scanner
checked_aiohttp_get() and checked_aiohttp_post() ARE called in production
FetchCoordinator uses its OWN circuit breaker implementation (_domain_blocked_until)
The module header comment 'TEST-SEAM ONLY' is misleading/outdated

network_consumers.session: own session management, does NOT use async_get_aiohttp_session
network_consumers.stealth: curl_cffi via fetch_via_curl_cffi (policy gated by should_use_curl_cffi)
notes: Domain circuit breaker is separate from transport/circuit_breaker.py
TransportResolver.resolve() is DORMANT — get_transport_for_url() is used instead

network_consumers.stealth: curl_cffi via fetch_via_curl_cffi (policy gated by should_use_curl_cffi)
notes: Own Tor/I2P session pools — bypasses FetchCoordinator darknet path
PUBLIC_FETCHER_ONLY — not used by canonical pipeline

network_consumers.verdict: live public pipeline hot path — uses shared session correctly
ACTIVE — fetch_via_curl_cffi used by public_fetcher escalation lane

network_consumers.session: own OrderedDict of curl_cffi AsyncSession per profile
network_consumers.verdict: BYPASS — own curl_cffi session pool, not via FetchCoordinator
BYPASS — own httpx client, own rate limiting
BYPASS — ephemeral httpx client per request

network_consumers.session: ephemeral aiohttp.ClientSession per call (async with session)
ephemeral aiohttp.ClientSession per call (async with session)
ephemeral aiohttp.ClientSession at line 1215 (async with session)
network_consumers.verdict: BYPASS — ephemeral session for backend health check
LEGACY_BYPASS — own httpx client for API paths
ACTIVE — uses circuit breaker for CT feed fetches
ACTIVE — uses circuit breaker for search queries
ACTIVE — uses circuit breaker for GitHub API calls

key_findings.finding: circuit_breaker.py IS wired via checked_aiohttp_get (correction: not TEST-SEAM only)
key_findings.detail: checked_aiohttp_get/checked_aiohttp_post are called by: ti_feed_adapter (10+ calls), duckduckgo_adapter (3 calls), github_secret_scanner (2 calls). FetchCoordinator uses its own separate circuit breaker (_domain_blocked_until). The module header comment is misleading.

key_findings.finding: FetchCoordinator uses separate circuit breaker implementation
key_findings.detail: _domain_blocked_until + _domain_failures dict in FetchCoordinator is the production circuit breaker. This is a separate implementation from transport/circuit_breaker.py.

key_findings.finding: public_fetcher has independent Tor/I2P session pools
key_findings.detail: _tor_session and _i2p_session are global lazy singletons in public_fetcher.py. FetchCoordinator._fetch_url uses _fetch_with_tor() and _darknet_connector instead. These are separate session pools.

SourceTransportMap.get() is used for classification, but TransportResolver.resolve() is not called in production. Comment at line 256: 'TransportResolver.resolve() is DORMANT — requires lifecycle preconditions'.

key_findings.finding: Multiple BYPASS consumers with no circuit breaker
key_findings.detail: stealth_manager, blockchain_analyzer, rir_correlator, wayback_diff_miner, passive_dns, threat-intelligence-automation, deep_research/utils, core/__main__, legacy/autonomous_orchestrator — all create own sessions with no circuit breaker protection.
pipeline/live_public_pipeline.py uses async_get_aiohttp_session() for article text fetch — this is the canonical PLAIN TCP surface. However, it has no circuit breaker protection.

key_findings.finding: HTTPX H2 lane is gated and optional
key_findings.detail: should_use_httpx_h2 returns False unless HLEDAC_ENABLE_HTTPX_H2 is set. It has its own H2CircuitBreaker instance. Not used in any current production path.

key_findings.finding: stealth_manager owns curl_cffi sessions per profile
key_findings.detail: StealthManager maintains OrderedDict[profile, AsyncSession] of curl_cffi sessions. These bypass FetchCoordinator and have no circuit breaker.

hot_path_analysis.clearnet_path: aiohttp preview (3s) then curl_cffi escalation or httpx_h2

patch_recommendations.action: Wire checked_aiohttp_get into FetchCoordinator for aiohttp preview fetches
Consider adding circuit_breaker.domain_breaker_check() guard to stealth_manager, blockchain_analyzer, passive_dns
patch_recommendations.risk: LOW — additive policy check, no behavioral change

patch_recommendations.action: Migrate to TransportResolver.resolve() when TorTransport/I2PTransport lifecycle is managed by resolver
